title: SAF Mandate: crop-derived sustainable aviation fuel
body: "We are seeking evidence, as well as broader feedback, on crop-derived sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). This is to improve our understanding of the impacts and interactions on areas such as feedstock availability, industrial development, sustainability and regulation. It covers the following types of crops:   energy crops cover crops food and feed crops   It should be noted that this categorisation may not be exhaustive, and we also welcome any comments on crops which respondents do not consider to be covered by the categories above.  "
